description: As the lead IT Administrator for the newly rebranded 'Nexus Vanguard', update the Snipe-IT global settings, update the CEO's user record, and provision her a new laptop using the new asset tag convention. Update the global settings to reflect the following: Site Name 'Nexus Vanguard Asset Manager', Default Currency 'EUR', Email Domain 'nexusvanguard.com', Default EULA 'By using this equipment, you agree to the Nexus Vanguard Acceptable Use Policy.', Support Email 'helpdesk@nexusvanguard.com', Support Phone '+44 20 7123 4567', Support URL 'https://support.nexusvanguard.com', Alert Email 'alerts@nexusvanguard.com', and Asset Tag Prefix 'NEX-' with auto-increment enabled. Update the email for user Jane Smith (jsmith) to 'jsmith@nexusvanguard.com'. Create a new XPS 15 laptop (Category: Laptops, Status: Ready to Deploy) using the system-generated 'NEX-' asset tag and check it out to Jane Smith.

metadata.expected_eula: By using this equipment, you agree to the Nexus Vanguard Acceptable Use Policy.
